title: Forever
writer: George L. Du Maurier, John Nathaniel Raphael, Ouida Bergère
actors: Wallace Reid, Elsie Ferguson, Montagu Love
plot: Architect Peter Ibbetson is hired by the Duke of Towers to design a building for him. Ibbetson discovers that the Duchess of Towers, Mary, is his now-grown childhood sweetheart. Their love revives, but Peter is sentenced to life i...
